idea-plugin.name: Azure DevOps AI Reviewer
idea-plugin.description:
AI-powered code review for Azure DevOps (on-prem Server) pull requests inside Rider.
Supports Claude (API key or Pro/Max subscription), OpenAI, and local LLMs via Ollama.
  • Browse PRs assigned to you across every repo in your collection
  • View changed files and diffs
  • Run a whole-PR AI review — bugs, security, performance, DDD/Clean Architecture, ASP.NET Zero/ABP conventions, dead code, readability — with a second adversarial pass to cut false positives
  • Bundled Roslyn static analysis (Roslynator + SonarAnalyzer) for compiler-accurate findings alongside the AI's judgment calls
  • Validate a PR's changes against a linked Azure DevOps work item's description, repro steps, and acceptance criteria
  • Apply suggested fixes directly, jump to code, and post human-toned comments back to Azure DevOps
  • Approve, reject, or complete (merge) the PR from within Rider
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.0
  • New "Work Item" tab: validate a PR's changes against a linked user story/task/bug's description, repro steps, and acceptance criteria
  • AI review now runs a second, adversarial pass to catch false positives and miscalibrated severities before showing results
  • Deeper C# review checklist: ASP.NET Zero/ABP conventions, database/code performance, dead code & visibility, readability
